items.title: US CPI cools faster than expected while crypto liquidity remains cautious
items.summary: Inflation data improved, but traders remain cautious ahead of the next Federal Reserve meeting.

items.title: Spot ETF inflows stabilize after a week of broad crypto outflows
items.summary: ETF flow data suggests that large-cap crypto demand is no longer deteriorating at last week's pace.

items.title: BNB Chain activity rebounds as DeFi volumes recover from monthly lows
items.summary: BNB Chain DEX volume and active address metrics improved, led by DeFi and payments activity.

items.title: FOMC speakers warn that policy may stay restrictive if inflation stalls
items.summary: Several officials said rate cuts require more confirmation, keeping macro risk on the calendar.

items.title: AI and DeFi tokens lead crypto social attention but liquidity filters remain important
items.summary: Narrative demand improved, although analysts cautioned that smaller tokens still need liquidity and security screening.
